username.label: Username
username.minLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
username.invalidChars: Only letters, numbers, hyphens (-) and underscores (_) are allowed

email.label: Email
email.alreadyRegistered: This email is already registered to another account

cedula.label: ID number (Cédula)
cedula.minDigits: ID must have at least 6 digits
cedula.maxDigits: ID cannot have more than 10 digits

birthDate.label: Date of birth
birthDate.underage: You must be at least 18 years old to use our service.

tooltip.title: Password must meet:
tooltip.special: At least one special character (@, #, $, etc.)

strength.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
strength.needNumber: Password must contain at least one number.
strength.needCase: Password must contain uppercase and lowercase letters.
strength.needSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character.

referralCode.label: Invitation code
referralCode.formatIncorrect: Incorrect format. Must have at least 1 character followed by 4 numbers.
referralCode.disclaimer: I understand that by registering with this invitation code, I will receive 1 month of Silver membership for free thanks to {{name}}.

dataVeracity.title: Data veracity declaration
dataVeracity.text: In accordance with Law 1581 of 2012 (Habeas Data) and Decree 1377 of 2013, I declare that the information provided is truthful, complete and up to date. I authorize the processing of my personal data in accordance with the privacy policy.

terms.prefix: I have read and accept the

welcome.title: Welcome to the {{siteName}} Club!
welcome.description: By registering, you will automatically join our club with a free basic membership. This will give you access to exclusive benefits, Virtual Coins accumulation and the ability to participate in our guest program.

formValidation.underage: You must be at least 18 years old
formValidation.weakPassword: Your password does not meet the security requirements
formValidation.invalidReferralFormat: The invitation code format is not valid
